name: Cross-Module Contract Extractor
short_description: Extracts the inter-module interface surface (public API boundaries, protocol/interface declarations, and function signatures crossing module boundaries) and detects breaking changes between versions using oasdiff-style semantic diffing applied to Kotlin .api dump files and Swift .swiftinterface / API dump outputs.
tech_stack: Kotlin binary-compatibility-validator (JetBrains) — generates .api dump files per Kotlin module, apiCheck task detects breaking changes; KLib ABI support added 2024
Adyen adyen-swift-public-api-diff (OSS, 2024) — compares Swift SDK versions, detects public API changes at class/method level via .swiftinterface diffing
swift-api-digester (built-in Swift toolchain) — diagnose-api-breaking-changes subcommand; known issues with ObjC dependencies
oasdiff (Go CLI, 450+ rules) — OpenAPI breaking-change detection; conceptual inspiration for rule-based diff approach adaptable to non-HTTP module contracts
tree-sitter (kotlin + swift) — extract public declarations (public/open/internal in Kotlin, public in Swift) per module boundary
SourceKit-LSP or swift-syntax — precise Swift public symbol extraction from .swiftinterface files
custom diff engine (Python) — applies oasdiff-style categorised rules to Kotlin .api diffs and Swift API diffs, classifies changes as breaking / non-breaking / additive
entity_model: Produces :ModuleContract nodes (module_name, version, snapshot_date, api_dump_path, language). :ContractSymbol nodes (fqn, kind=[class|interface|function|property|typealias], visibility, signature_hash). :EXPORTS edge links :Module → :ContractSymbol. :ContractDiff nodes (from_version, to_version, change_count, breaking_count, additive_count, deprecation_count). :SymbolChange nodes (fqn, change_type=[removed|signature-changed|visibility-reduced|added|deprecated], is_breaking=bool, breaking_rule). :CHANGED_SYMBOL edge links :ContractDiff → :SymbolChange. Applies structural/capability facets: structural=contract-surface, capability=BreakingChangeDetection. :ContractConsumer edges link modules that import a :ContractSymbol, enabling consumer-impact analysis.
storage_format: hybrid — :ModuleContract, :ContractSymbol, :ContractDiff, :SymbolChange written to Graphiti as EntityNodes. Supplementary .knowledge/contract-diff-<version>.md written per diff run for human review. API dump snapshots stored in .knowledge/api-snapshots/ as versioned markdown-adjacent artifacts.

prior_art.name: Kotlin binary-compatibility-validator
prior_art.description: JetBrains tool (Apache 2.0). Generates .api dump files and checks them in CI. apiCheck task fails if public API changes without updating dump. KLib ABI support (experimental, added 2024). Widely adopted in JetBrains ecosystem libraries. Produces human-readable .api diff on PR. Last major release: v0.16.x (2024).

prior_art.name: adyen-swift-public-api-diff
prior_art.description: OSS tool comparing 2 Swift SDK versions. Supports Git reference comparison, .swiftinterface comparison, framework binary comparison. GitHub Action integration. Published and maintained 2024. MIT license.

prior_art.name: swift-api-digester (Swift toolchain)
prior_art.description: Built-in Swift tool (diagnose-api-breaking-changes subcommand, formerly experimental-api-diff). Issues reported with Swift 6.0.2 (module redefinition errors, Nov 2024, Issue #8103). iOS platform support limited. Open-source, part of swiftlang.
prior_art.maintenance: maintained as part of Swift toolchain; known issues

prior_art.name: oasdiff
prior_art.description: Go CLI tool for OpenAPI breaking change detection. 450+ categorised rules. GitHub Action, CI integration. Apache 2.0. Conceptually applicable to any versioned API surface via rule adaptation. Not directly applicable to Kotlin/.swift — used as design inspiration.

prior_art.name: Sourcegraph SCIP
prior_art.description: Code Intelligence Protocol providing stable cross-version symbol IDs. scip-kotlin (SemanticDB compiler plugin) enables stable FQN tracking across versions — useful for contract symbol identity across diffs.

prior_art.name: RepoGraph (arXiv 2410.14684)
prior_art.description: 2024 paper with module-level call graph construction. Consumer-impact analysis for contract breakage requires similar cross-module call graph. Approach informs :ContractConsumer edge design.

prior_art.name: Kotlin API Guidelines (JetBrains)
prior_art.description: Official backward-compatibility guidelines for Kotlin library authors. Defines source- vs binary-compatible change taxonomy. Feeds breaking_rule classification.

prior_art.name: swift-api-diff (ltetzlaff)
prior_art.description: GitHub Action that comments API changes on PRs for Swift packages. Lightweight alternative to swift-api-digester.

consumer_query_patterns:
// All breaking changes in the latest diff for a Kit module
MATCH (cd:ContractDiff {from_version: $prev_version, to_version: $new_version})-[:CHANGED_SYMBOL]->(sc:SymbolChange {is_breaking: true})
WHERE cd.module_name = $module_name
RETURN sc.fqn, sc.change_type, sc.breaking_rule ORDER BY sc.change_type

// Which modules consume a symbol that was changed (impact blast radius)
MATCH (sc:SymbolChange {fqn: $changed_fqn, is_breaking: true})
MATCH (m:Module)-[:IMPORTS_SYMBOL]->(:ContractSymbol {fqn: $changed_fqn})
RETURN m.name, m.kind ORDER BY m.name

// Modules with the most breaking changes in the last quarter
MATCH (cd:ContractDiff)
WHERE cd.snapshot_date > datetime() - duration('P90D')
RETURN cd.module_name, sum(cd.breaking_count) AS total_breaking ORDER BY total_breaking DESC LIMIT 10
graphiti_episode_type: EntityNode — :ModuleContract and :ContractSymbol are versioned entities; each new version creates new nodes (old nodes carry end_time). :ContractDiff and :SymbolChange are EpisodicNodes tied to a specific version transition (no end_time — historical record). :ContractConsumer edges carry end_time when a module stops importing a symbol.
ingest_perf_est: [uncertain] Kotlin binary-compatibility-validator apiDump on 20 modules: ~3–8 minutes (requires compilation). Swift API dump generation per module: ~1–3 minutes. Diff computation: <30 seconds per module pair. Total full ingest: ~10–20 minutes. Incremental: ~2–5 minutes. All analogical estimates.
failure_modes: swift-api-digester fails with 'redefinition of module' errors on iOS-target packages with ObjC dependencies (Swift Forums Issue #8103, Nov 2024)
Kotlin binary-compatibility-validator KLib ABI support is experimental (2024)
Contract extraction requires compilation — if the build is broken, no contract snapshot can be generated
Binary-compatibility-validator tracks JVM ABI, not source compatibility
oasdiff-style rule adaptation to Kotlin/.swift requires custom rule authoring — no off-the-shelf rule set exists
open_questions: Overlap with Item 27 (Public API Surface Extractor): :ContractSymbol nodes overlap substantially. Should Items 27 and 31 share a common :PublicSymbol node schema?
Overlap with Item 4 (KMP Platform-Bridge Extractor): KMP ObjC export surface is both a bridge surface (Item 4) and a cross-module contract (Item 31). Clear spec decision needed.
Breaking change classification: binary vs source compatibility? For Kit-to-Kit dependencies in KMP, binary compatibility matters most.
Should contract snapshots be committed to the repository (.api files) to enable diff on PR, or stored only in Graphiti?
How to handle internal APIs annotated with @InternalKotlinApi or @RequiresOptIn? Filtering requires annotation-aware parsing.
adversarial_resistance: high — public API surface is extracted from compiler-generated artifacts (.api dumps, .swiftinterface) which are deterministic given the same source and compiler version.
